summary: Iteration 104 - Technical Debt Remediation Pass #3 complete. All 68 pytest tests passed (23 automation_helpers + 45 reference_helpers). All 10 API endpoints verified. Grep checks confirmed ZERO raw datetime calls in target services.

automation_helpers.py.utcnow: Used by all 5 services (decision_policy_service, automation_rules_service, auto_resolution_service, auto_clear_service, auto_post_service)

automation_helpers.py.build_document_update: Used by auto_resolution_service for hub_documents updates
automation_helpers.py.apply_document_update: Used by auto_post_service for DB writes

critical_code_review_comments: automation_helpers.py provides canonical timestamp, activity creation, and document update helpers preventing ~50 inline datetime calls
decision_policy_service.py correctly imports utcnow, create_activity, build_document_update from automation_helpers
automation_rules_service.py correctly imports utcnow from automation_helpers
auto_resolution_service.py correctly imports utcnow, build_document_update from automation_helpers
auto_clear_service.py correctly imports utcnow from automation_helpers
auto_post_service.py correctly imports utcnow, apply_document_update from automation_helpers
EligibilityCheck/EligibilityResult dataclasses provide structured check outcome patterns
All services preserve original API contracts - purely structural consolidation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 104 - Technical debt remediation pass #3 complete.
